name: Suspension Orb
description: History Before Exalt Version 1.1.0.0 (Sep 2020), this item inflicted Curse for 4.5s, scaling at 30 wisdom and above. It has received new WisMod formulas.
effects: On enemies: Stasis and Curse Stasis Radius: 3 tiles Stasis Duration: 3.5 seconds Curse Radius: 5 (+0.1 per WIS over 50) tiles Curse Duration: 2.5 (+1 per 10 WIS over 50) seconds
